name: Acer Aspire 3 A315
short_description: Your perfect study companion — light enough for the commute, with a full day of battery so you never need to hunt for a plug. Great for Netflix evenings too! 🎓

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3
short_description: Slim, stylish, and super reliable — perfect for students who want something that just works every single day without any fuss. Fits in any bag! 💼

name: HP 15s-fq5
short_description: A solid all-rounder from HP — handles everything from lecture notes to YouTube without breaking a sweat. Clean design that looks great in any setting. ✨

name: Asus VivoBook 15
short_description: Bright screen, great sound, and enough oomph for a full uni day — this is the laptop Laura would love! Perfect for streaming, studying, and everything in between. 🌟

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Gaming 3
short_description: Budget gaming champ! Handles esports games like CS:GO and League of Legends beautifully, and still works great for uni when the gaming session is over. 🎮

name: Acer Nitro 5
short_description: The go-to gaming laptop for students on a budget — built for games but smart enough for lectures. A true dual-personality machine that won't let you down! 🔥

name: HP Victus 15
short_description: HP's sleek take on a student gaming laptop — it doesn't scream "gamer" but absolutely performs like one. Perfect for Maca's CS:GO sessions and morning lectures! ⚡

name: Asus TUF Gaming A15
short_description: Built tough, plays hard — the Asus TUF is for serious gamers who also need a laptop that survives the chaos of student life. Games run silky smooth! 💪

name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 5
short_description: Feather-light and incredibly elegant — the Surface Laptop is the luxury choice for those who want something premium, all-day battery, and fits in any environment. 💎

name: MacBook Air M2
short_description: The best laptop for those who want it all — silent, blazing fast, outrageously light, and the best battery life you'll ever experience. An investment that lasts years! 🍎

name: Dell Inspiron 15
short_description: Dell's reliable everyday workhorse — trusted by millions of students worldwide. Does everything you need without any surprises, at a very friendly price. 👍

name: MSI Thin GF63
short_description: A surprisingly slim gaming laptop — lighter than most, so you can game hard and still carry it to class without your back complaining! 🎒🎮
